control_description: Encryption and Decryption — S3 PHI bucket must use CMK
Encryption and Decryption — DynamoDB PHI table must use CMK
Transmission Security — S3 must deny non-TLS requests
Contingency Plan — S3 versioning enables recovery of PHI
Transmission Security — Lambda must run inside VPC
Availability — Lambda DLQ and reserved concurrency
Access Control — Lambda IAM role least privilege
Audit Controls — API Gateway access logging + throttling
Evidence vault — immutable S3 Object Lock
